message:
Running command: # Key finding: The DRT reads ODB from step 67 (repairAntennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion).
# This ODB has multiple VDDIO pins because they come from the PDN generation (step 47).
# FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS=false didn't help because PDN generates them.

# Check the DRT script for any net filtering options
cat /nix/store/zkzv2pzi9yp00dmvlcvkdh2kxykicfqk-python3.13-librelane-3.0.2/lib/python3.13/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/drt.tcl 2>/dev/null | grep -A5 -B5 "dont\|skip\|ignore\|VDDIO\|power\|supply"
